notes:
Tested Proton Hotfix, Experimental, and Experimental Bleeding Edge (2026-04-11). Also deleted compatdata/3321460 and shadercache/3321460 multiple times, disabled Steam Overlay, and tested both single-monitor and dual-monitor setups at 1920x1080.

Result is always the same:
Splash screen appears, then the game exits immediately. It never reaches the menu.

Notably, no Pearl Abyss local profile/config files seem to get created under compatdata/3321460, so it looks like the game dies before normal local initialization.

Relevant Proton log line:
System.ComponentModel.Win32Exception: Invalid window handle

On my side, Vulkan / RADV / radeonsi look healthy, so this does not seem to be a general Mint or broken graphics-stack issue.
